history.content: --- CALL START (SID: CAb89ac072ff76bd2172158b01a83c3934) ---
Hi, Vijay here from Hivericks. Just calling regarding the XOptimus charger. Is it a right time to talk?
Yes, it is a right time to talk and I am just looking a product, but I'm just not convinced with the features.
I'm having trouble hearing you.
No, no, I'm just saying. I'm just looking for the product but I'm not convinced that the features.
Validating your interest in our product can really help us understand what you're looking for and find a solution that meets your needs.
Say I'm just saying I'm not interested in your product, but I want to know the features.
Okay, that's perfectly fine. Can you tell me a bit more about what's not working for you with our XOptimus Smart Charger? Are there any specific issues you've been experiencing?
Other place talk to.
I didn't catch that.
--- CALL START (SID: CAf3e1ae19ccc09cbdca3f380fb6eb1989) ---
Hi, Vijay here again from Hivericks. Picking up from where we left off—is now a good time?
I think it's a good time to talk.
Vijay: That's a valid point. It does save ₹50,000 on your phone battery over the year.
Well, what is speaking about? I don't have a budget.
Hello! Don't worry, this product can be within your budget, but it really depends on how you use it and what features are important to you.
I'm cutting the phone.

That's a valid point. Cutting your phone can reduce its battery life significantly. But did you know that our XOptimus Smart Charger can actually increase your Li-Ion battery life expectancy by up to 25%? It also prevents overheating and

Hi Prags,

Notion can be used for a lot of things. But building from scratch can take time.

Now you can create custom setups instantly with AI! Describe what you need (you can be as detailed as you’d like), and AI will build your use case.

Databases ( https://notion.so/build-database?t=aiBuilder&utm_campaign=%5BV2%5D+Databases+-+New+use+case+discovery&utm_campaignid=592&utm_campaigntype=behavioral&utm_content=%28JW+-+DBs%29+Email+1+-+Personal&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

Setting up Notion is now as simple as describing what you're working on. AI can instantly generate the perfect habit tracker, knowledge base, or any other tool you dream up.

Get started ( https://notion.so/build-database?t=aiBuilder&utm_campaign=%5BV2%5D+Databases+-+New+use+case+discovery&utm_campaignid=592&utm_campaigntype=behavioral&utm_content=%28JW+-+DBs%29+Email+1+-+Personal&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

We hope this saves you time!

The Notion Team

Dear vijay,


Happy New Year!


As we step into 2026, it’s the perfect time to invest in yourself and your 
future. At the University of Edinburgh, we’re here to support your growth 
in the coming year.


Whether you are looking to change your career or explore a new passion,

Course spotlight | Climate Change: Carbon Capture and Storage


Our planet's atmosphere is a shared resource and can only absorb a limited 
amount of greenhouse gases. This course, taught by a team of leading 
academics at the University of Edinburgh - with decades of experience in 
the field - aims to bridge the gap between the latest developments in the 
science, engineering, geology, policy and economics of climate change.


It’s ideal for anyone looking to learn more about energy, sustainability 
and climate.


Boost your sustainability skills today

googleplay-noreply@google.com.last_user_message:
Hello Prags,

We've updated settings that manage personalisation and activity history on Play. You'll have dedicated controls for personalisation on Play and for saving activity in your Google Account's Play History, and these settings will be easily accessible in the Google Play menu.

In the past, personalisation and history on Play were managed by Web & App Activity (WAA) settings in your Google Account. Going forwards, WAA will no longer control Play personalisation and Play History. Instead, you'll be able to manage those settings directly on Play, and you'll see this change in your account in the next few days. Learn more about Play personalisation and Play History <http://support.google.com/googleplay?p=personalize_play_migration>

When the transition happens for your account, your Play settings will be based on the most recent choice that you made in WAA, so your experience will stay the same. If you have WAA turned on during the transition, which is happening over the next few days, then your Play personalisation and Play History settings will be on, and if WAA is off, then Play personalisation and Play History will be off. As before, you’ll be able to choose how long your activity is saved in your Play History and if you want to delete it from Play History manually or automatically.

After the transition is complete, WAA and Play settings will be separate, and changes to one will no longer affect the other. You can view and change your Play privacy settings in Personalisation in Play <https://myactivity.google.com/product/google_play/personalization> at any time.
